title: Blade of Ink
description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
smart_description: Whenever you play an Attack this turn, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
notes: Counter increments each time an Attack is played. All gained Strength is removed at the end of the turn.
